message:
✨ Differentiate saved mission CTA by context (#3059)

Three distinct states for the saved mission bottom action:

1. console.kubestellar.io (Netlify/forced demo): quiet text with a
   clickable link that opens the install-locally dialog

2. Localhost with demo mode on (agent not installed): "Install Agent &
   Run Mission" button → fires open-agent-setup event to show the
   AgentSetupDialog, plus a smaller "Already have the agent? Turn off
   demo mode" link

3. Live mode (demo off): "Run Mission" button → runs the mission

Also adds open-agent-setup custom event listener to AgentSetupDialog so
it can be triggered imperatively from anywhere.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
